title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic released the Mythos model family with Fable 5 (Mythos 5 with guardrails) as a generally available option. Fable 5 shows impressive benchmark results and will be included at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which usage will require credits pending capacity expansion.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of the Mythos model family, focusing on Fable 5, which is Mythos 5 with guardrails offered as a generally available option. Fable 5 posts strong benchmark results and ships at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22. After that date, usage will require credits, pending capacity expansion.
